title: Fake Explosion Lib
description: A simple library to produce a fake explosion, fully customizable.
body:
**An update is in progress. This pack will be re-branded upon release to "Sumulated Effects Lib", as more effects than just a "fake explosion" will be included.**


# Fake Explosion Effect Library

### How to use:

Fake Explosion Lib is used by:
1. Configuring To your desire
2. Running the "summon effect" function when you need the effect

### Plans for Addition:

If you need a trigger or effect built into the pack, I am happy to update to include it.

Please reach out in my discord if you would like a specific ability with the effect.

### Warnings:

The Lightning effect may cause issues in some cases. This is the main reason this pack exists. You may choose to keep it if you like, but you have the configurability you need.
